app.name: Interior AI
app.tagline: Coohom and Foyr render your design. We cost it, quantify it, and write the proposal — in your style, for your market.

home.title: Design operations, costed for your market
home.subtitle: Upload a floor plan and a brief. Get a concept, a quantified BOQ, a client proposal, and a render — priced in ₹ against Indian rates.

advisory.disclaimer: Rates are directional estimates and need local verification. Working drawings require sign-off by a licensed professional.

errors.validation_error: Some details are missing or need a second look.
errors.quota_exceeded: You've used every project on your plan. Upgrade to add more.
errors.provider_error: A service we rely on didn't respond. Please try again.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong on our side.

auth.title: Sign in to Interior AI
auth.subtitle: Use your email, or continue with GitHub.

dashboard.title: Your projects

floorplan.checkFlagged: Some dimensions were hard to read — the flagged rooms are worth checking.

validate.readyHint: The brief is complete and your cultural guidance is confirmed.

validate.blockedHint: Design and costing run on these answers, so they have to be right before we start.
